title: Pete & Gerry's CEO: Overpopulation Lowering Egg Prices
summary: Pete & Gerry's CEO Tom Flocco discusses how overpopulation is reducing the price of eggs for consumers, egg industry challenges, and the rise of protein. He talks with Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Complex CEO on Launch of 'Complex Bets' with Fanatics
summary: Complex CEO Aaron Levant discusses teaming up with Fanatics to launch 'Complex Bets', a sports betting and trading content platform aimed at bringing pop culture to the betting and predictions market. He talks with Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: British Columbia Gets Fifth Credit Downgrade From S&P Since 2021
summary: British Columbia, the western Canadian province that once boasted a top AAA credit rating, was downgraded by S&P Global Ratings for the fifth time since 2021 on Thursday.

title: Cirincione: Don't Expect Negotiated End to Iran War
summary: Center for International Policy Vice Chair Joe Cirincione discusses President Trump feeling the pressure as oil continues to surge on prolonged war fears, and why Iran should make a deal before it's 'too late.' He talks with Scarlet Fu and Katie Greifeld on "The Close" (Source: Bloomberg)

Hedge Funds Walloped by a Month of Turmoil Sparked by War
summary: Some of the world’s biggest hedge funds known for delivering steady returns lost money in March as the war in the Middle East roiled markets across energy, bonds and equities and forced traders to unwind crowded positions.
